case_title: LAU, SOPHIE DBA LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP VS SHEN, CHENG CHENG DBA AMERICAN CORNER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LAU, SOPHIE DBA LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT SHEN, CHENG CHENG DBA AMERICAN CORNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHEN, CHENG CHENG DBA AMERICAN CORNER
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHEN, CHENG CHENG DBA AMERICAN CORNER HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, SOPHIE DBA LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHEN, CHENG CHENG DBA AMERICAN CORNER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, SOPHIE DBA LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEN, CHENG CHENG DBA AMERICAN CORNER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-28-2001, GRANTED
